title: swantia aurantia
intro: Swantia aurantia, also known as the yellow swan orchid, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the orchid family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that help to soothe wounds and prevent infections. The health benefits of Swantia aurantia include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote healing, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Swantia aurantia can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
